info.title: Rapidata Rapid API
info.description: The API for the Rapidata Rapid service

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The id of the rapid to delete.

get.summary: Gets the most recent public responses across all customers.
Gets all responses for a given rapid.

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The rapid to get the responses for.

get.summary: Queries all rapids that have been flagged.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by id.

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Filter by correlation_id.

parameters.name: owner_id
parameters.description: Filter by owner_id.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Filter by key.

parameters.name: completed_at
parameters.description: Filter by completed_at.

parameters.name: logic
parameters.description: How to combine the field filters: "and" (default) requires every filter to match, "or" requires any of them to match.

get.summary: Queries rapids that may be eligible for validation-set creation.

parameters.name: correlationId
parameters.description: The correlation id whose rapids should be considered.

parameters.name: minResponses
parameters.description: The minimum response count for a rapid to qualify.

parameters.name: minConfidence
parameters.description: The minimum confidence for a rapid to qualify.

parameters.name: targetGroupId
parameters.description: An optional subgroup of rapids to restrict the query to.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: rapid_id
parameters.description: Filter by rapid_id.

parameters.name: response_count
parameters.description: Filter by response_count.

parameters.name: confidence
parameters.description: Filter by confidence.

parameters.name: logic
parameters.description: How to combine the field filters: "and" (default) requires every filter to match, "or" requires any of them to match.

post.description: The rapid is returned to the active labeling pool and cannot be flagged again.

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The id of the rapid to unflag.

patch.summary: Updates the validation information of a rapid.

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The id of the rapid to update.

post.summary: Creates a new global text entry.

requestBody.description: The payload describing the entry to create.

parameters.name: globalTextId
parameters.description: The id of the global text entry to delete.

patch.summary: Updates a global text entry using patch semantics.

parameters.name: globalTextId
parameters.description: The id of the global text entry to update.

requestBody.description: The patch payload describing which fields should change.

get.summary:
Gets the anchor rapid and its surrounding rapids within the results slice, in the order
 and filter the results grid renders, so the explorer can step neighbour-to-neighbour.
get.description:
Navigation follows the grid's default order (flagged rapids first, then by id) over the
 given correlation slice. Returns 404 when the rapid is not part of the filtered slice.

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The rapid to anchor navigation on.

parameters.name: correlationId
parameters.description: The correlation id whose result slice to navigate.

parameters.name: states
parameters.description: Optional rapid states to filter by; all states are included when omitted.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: The maximum number of neighbours to return on each side.

parameters.name: includeNotAccepted
parameters.description: When true, not-accepted responses count toward the anchor's sample and aggregation.

parameters.name: includeOverflow
parameters.description: When true, overflow responses count toward the anchor's sample and aggregation.

post.summary: Recalculates the compare AB summary counters of a correlation from scratch.
post.description:
Admin-only verification/repair tool. The counters are normally maintained by rapid
 completion and rejection events; this overwrites them with freshly aggregated values.

parameters.name: correlationId
parameters.description: The correlation (workflow) id to recalculate.

post.summary: Rejects a completed rapid, marking its results as invalid.
post.description:
Valid from the Done, Labeling, Paused or Flagged state. Rejection propagates staleness to
 dependent entities.

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The identifier of the rapid to reject.

post.summary: Submits a response for a rapid.

requestBody.description: The submitted result and session index.

get.summary: Inspects a report's dump so that it can be replayed or restored.

parameters.name: reportId
parameters.description: The id of the report to inspect.

get.summary: Returns whether the rapid bag associated with the current user is still valid.

post.summary: Reports an issue with a rapid.

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The rapid to report.

post.summary: Records that the user skipped the specified rapid.

requestBody.description: The id of the rapid being skipped and the session index.

post.summary: Submits feedback for a validation rapid outcome.

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The ID of the rapid to provide feedback for.

get.summary: Queries validation feedbacks for a rapid.

parameters.name: rapidId
parameters.description: The ID of the rapid to query feedbacks for.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Filter by user_id.

parameters.name: feedback
parameters.description: Filter by feedback.

parameters.name: created_at
parameters.description: Filter by created_at.

parameters.name: logic
parameters.description: How to combine the field filters: "and" (default) requires every filter to match, "or" requires any of them to match.

sessionIndex.description: The index of the session when the result was submitted.

result.description: The result submitted by the user.

validationTruth.description: The validation truth applied to the response, if any.

explanation.description: An optional translated explanation for the user.

userScore.description: The user's score after processing this response.

nextRapid.description:
The next rapid to solve when the session streams its rapids and continues.
 Null when there is nothing further to solve.

key.description: The identifier of the demographic classification.

featureFlags.description: Optional feature flags to apply to the rapid.

asset.description: An optional asset to associate with the rapid.

context.description: An optional text context to show to the user.

contextAsset.description: An optional asset to use as context to show to the user.

rapidId.description: The id of the created rapid.

key.description: The human-readable key used to look up the text from translations.

englishText.description: The English source text that all translations derive from.

globalTextId.description: The unique identifier of the created global text entry.

globalTexts.description: The list of global text entries.

current.description: The anchor rapid, carrying the same fields a results-grid card renders.

previous.description:
The rapids preceding the anchor in grid order, at most window entries,
 ordered ascending with the neighbour adjacent to the anchor last.

next.description:
The rapids following the anchor in grid order, at most window entries,
 in ascending order.

index.description: The 1-based position of the anchor within the filtered slice.

total.description: The total number of rapids in the filtered slice.

responses.description: The list of responses for the rapid.

isValid.description: Whether the rapid bag is valid.

id.description: The unique identifier of the rapid.

referee.description: The referee that created the rapid.

asset.description: The asset associated with the rapid.

hasResponses.description: Whether the rapid has any responses.

shouldAcceptIncorrect.description: Whether the rapid should accept incorrect answers.

truth.description: The optional validation truth of the rapid.

explanation.description: The optional explanation shown when users answer incorrectly.

randomCorrectProbability.description: The probability of a random correct answer.

key.description: An optional key for the rapid.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the rapid was completed.

featureFlags.description: The feature flags enabled for the rapid.

id.description: The unique identifier of the feedback.

userId.description: The ID of the user who submitted the feedback.

sessionId.description: The session ID of the user who submitted the feedback.

englishFeedback.description: The English translation of the feedback, or null when unavailable.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the feedback was created.

responseCount.description: The number of responses that the rapid has received.

confidence.description: The confidence of the rapid's aggregated response.

truth.description: The derived validation truth for the rapid.

issue.description: A streamlined enum representing common issues.

message.description: An optional message typed by the user.

dump.description: A dump that the frontend defines and can read again.

source.description: An optional identifier where the report originated from.

rapidId.description: The ID of the Rapid that was skipped.

sessionIndex.description: The index of the session when the Rapid was skipped.

validationTruth.description: The validation truth applied, if any.

explanation.description: An optional translated explanation for the user.

userScore.description: The user's score after the skip.

nextRapid.description:
The next rapid to solve when the session streams its rapids and continues.
 Null when there is nothing further to solve.

key.description: The new key for the global text entry.

englishText.description: The new English source text for the global text entry.

truth.description: The truth for the validation rapid.

explanation.description: The optional explanation shown when users answer incorrectly.

context.description: An optional text context to show the user.

contextAsset.description: An optional asset to use as context to show the user.

randomCorrectProbability.description: The probability that a random answer is correct.

sortIndex.description: Controls the serving order of rapids within a target group.
